originalTitle: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
content: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.

originalTitle: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
title: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
content: Judges handed down sentences ranging from five years to life imprisonment following mass trials.

originalTitle: UK shelves Chagos deal after Trump opposition
title: UK shelves Chagos deal after Trump opposition
content: UK government officials say they are not entirely abandoning the agreement but have run out of time.

originalTitle: Benin holds presidential election amid deteriorating security situation
title: Benin holds presidential election amid deteriorating security situation
content: Benin is facing harsh economic conditions and security challenges that its new leader will have to address.

originalTitle: Union Berlin’s Marie-Louise Eta becomes first female manager of men’s team
title: Union Berlin’s Marie-Louise Eta becomes first female manager of men’s team
content: Berlin's Eta becomes first female head coach of a top-tier European club after her appointment by the Bundesliga side.

originalTitle: Saudi Arabia says key oil pipeline back to full capacity after attacks
title: Saudi Arabia says key oil pipeline back to full capacity after attacks
content: The Ministry of Energy says the East-West pipeline is back to pumping about 7 million barrels per day.

originalTitle: Hungarians vote in big numbers on whether to end Orbán rule and elect rival
title: Hungarians vote in big numbers on whether to end Orbán rule and elect rival
content: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, and early figures point to a record turnout of voters.

originalTitle: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
title: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
content: Her infectious voice got fans dancing and singing, becoming the soundtrack for generations of Indians.

originalTitle: Ukraine and Russia accuse each other of hundreds of ceasefire violations
title: Ukraine and Russia accuse each other of hundreds of ceasefire violations
content: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says his nation's forces would respond "symmetrically" to Russian attacks.

originalTitle: 'Big punch in the face' - could Arsenal really blow title from here?
title: 'Big punch in the face' - could Arsenal really blow title from here?
content: Nine points clear with six games to play - could Arsenal still really blow the Premier League title from that position?

originalTitle: What is going on with Garnacho?
title: What is going on with Garnacho?
content: Alejandro Garnacho is struggling to stand out at Chelsea - so can the £40m signing from Manchester United still realise his potential at Stamford Bridge?

originalTitle: Union Berlin appoint first female boss in Europe's top men's leagues
title: Union Berlin appoint first female boss in Europe's top men's leagues
content: Marie-Louise Eta becomes the first woman appointed to manage a men's team in one of Europe's top five leagues as she is named interim head coach of Bundesliga side Union Berlin.
